<br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.speechify.com">http://www.speechify.com</a> </p> <div><strong><br>Overview<br></strong></div> <div><br>As Speechify expands, our Platform team seeks a Senior Software Engineer. This role is central to ensuring our success at Speechify by working on key features like: Payments, Analytics, Subscriptions and our API. If you are passionate about strategizing, enjoy high-paced environments, and are eager to take ownership of product decisions, we’d love to hear from you.<br><br></div> <div><strong><br>What You’ll Do<br></strong></div> <ul> <li>Design, develop, and maintain robust APIs including Public TTS API, Internal APIs like Payment, Subscription, Auth and Consumption Tracking, ensuring they meet business and scalability requirements.</li> <li>Oversee the full backend API landscape, enhancing and optimizing for performance and maintainability.&nbsp;</li> <li>Collaborate on B2B solutions, focusing on customization and integration needs for enterprise clients.</li> <li>Work closely with cross-functional teams to align backend architecture with overall product strategy and user experience.</li> </ul> <div><strong><br>An Ideal Candidate Should Have<br></strong></div> <ul> <li>Proven experience in backend development: TS/Node (required), Go (nice to have)</li> <li>Direct experience with GCP and knowledge of AWS, Azure, or other cloud providers.</li> <li>Efficiency in ideation and implementation, prioritizing tasks based on urgency and impact.</li> <li>Preferred: Experience with Docker and containerized deployments.</li> <li>Preferred: Proficiency in deploying high availability applications on Kubernetes</li> </ul> <div><strong><br>What We Offer<br></strong></div> <ul> <li>A dynamic environment where your contributions shape the company and its products.</li> <li>A team that values innovation, intuition, and drive.</li> <li>Autonomy, fostering focus and creativity.</li> <li>The opportunity to have a significant impact in a revolutionary industry.</li> <li>Competitive compensation, a welcoming atmosphere, and a commitment to an exceptional asynchronous work culture.</li> <li>The privilege of working on a product that changes lives, particularly for those with learning differences like dyslexia, ADD, and more.</li> <li>An active role at the intersection of artificial intelligence and audio – a rapidly evolving tech domain.</li> </ul> <div><strong><br>Think you’re a good fit for this job?&nbsp;<br></strong></div> <div><br>Tell us more about yourself and why you're interested in the role when you apply.<br>And don’t forget to include links to your portfolio and LinkedIn.<br><br></div> <div><strong><br>Not looking but know someone who would make a great fit?&nbsp;<br></strong></div> <div><br>Refer them!&nbsp;<br><br></div> <div><strong><br>Speechify is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace.&nbsp;<br></strong></div> <div><br>Speechify does
